icons.arrow-up-tray: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" data-slot="icon"> <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 16.5v2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 5.25 21h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21 18.75V16.5m-13.5-9L12 3m0 0 4.5 4.5M12 3v13.5"/> </svg>
icons.view-columns: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" data-slot="icon"> <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 4.5v15m6-15v15m-10.875 0h15.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V5.625c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H4.125C3.504 4.5 3 5.004 3 5.625v12.75c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125Z"/> </svg>
icons.command-line: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" data-slot="icon"> <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m6.75 7.5 3 2.25-3 2.25m4.5 0h3m-9 8.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21 18V6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 6v12a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Z"/> </svg>

patterns.theme-variant-icons: Each theme variant (cp, vp, ppm, maconomy) has its own predefined icon set. All themes start with Dela custom logo (RS_DelaDefault.svg default, RS_Dela_Active.svg active) as the first item. CP has 3 sections with 3, 2, and 4 items. VP, PPM, and Maconomy have 3 sections with 8, 3, and 3 items. Use the template in the spec for the exact sections and items.
patterns.custom-icon-support: Navigation items support two icon approaches: standard Icon component (icon: Heroicons name) or custom images (isCustom: true, customSrc, customSrcActive). Custom images use right-sidebar__dela-logo classes.
patterns.panel-data-attributes: Items use data attributes for ShellPanel: panelTitle, panelIcon, panelContentId, useGradientHeader. Dela AI items get gradient header automatically.

guidelines.when-to-use: Use RightSidebar for unified right navigation. Collapsed shows icons only (52px); hover expands to 220px with labels. Theme variant controls which default sections/items are shown.
guidelines.composition: Place inside shell layout; connect to ShellPanel for panel content when item is clicked.

state.name: collapsed
state.description: Whether sidebar is collapsed (if toggle exists)

examples.name: CP with left sidebar
examples.description: CP layout with collapsible left sidebar

examples.name: CP minimal
examples.description: Minimal CP layout with header and floating nav only

examples.name: Standard with sidebars
examples.description: Full layout with left and right sidebars

examples.name: Standard minimal
examples.description: Minimal layout with header and footer only

examples.name: With sections
examples.description: Multiple visual blocks with gaps, each with elevation and stroke (see component JSON).
